title: Engineer ITRAC
summary:
At Cognizant

Job Summary

We are seeking a Full Stack Developer with strong experience building modern web applications dashboards and interactive user interfaces. The ideal candidate will have hands-on experience developing responsive frontend experiences, integrating with APIs and data services, and delivering scalable applications that support analytics, reporting, and operational workflows.

Responsibilities

Job Title Engineer ITRAC

Key Responsibilities

Design, develop and maintain responsive web applications and dashboards.
Build interactive UI components using modern JavaScript frameworks such as React.
Develop and integrate backend services, REST APIs and data access layers.
Create data visualizations, charts, filters and reporting views for business users.
Collaborate with prod
requirements: 3+ years of full stack development experience.
Strong frontend development skills using JavaScript/TypeScript, HTML and CSS.
Experience with modern UI frameworks such as React.
Experience building dashboards, reporting tools or data-driven web interfaces.
Backend development experience using Node.js, Python, Java or .NET.
Experience integrating with REST APIs and relational or NoSQL databases.
Familiarity with Git, CI/CD workflows and Agile development practices.
Strong problem-solving skills and attention to user experience.
preferred_qualifications: Experience with visualization libraries such as Power BI.
Experience with cloud platforms such as Azure.
Knowledge of UI/UX design principles and accessibility best practices.
Experience with containerized applications using Docker.
Familiarity with analytics data platforms or enterprise reporting environments.
